Operation 'searchBible' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. The original summary 'Search a Bible' is too generic and doesn't clarify the search target (verses). The description lacks critical details about what parameters are expected (search query, filters), what the operation returns (matching verses with references and text), and how results are structured. Enhanced version specifies the search scope (verses), mentions parameter types, clarifies the response structure (SearchResponse with verse details), and improves AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.
